summary: A solid 4‑star capture recorded by Dominic Tringale and Roger Jones; recording quality seems good but no performance details are available.
review: The only feedback notes that the show was recorded by Dominic Tringale and Roger Jones, earning a respectable four‑star rating. No comments on soundboard vs. audience source, clarity, or mix are provided, nor any observations about the musical performance or setlist. Consequently, while the recording appears to be of decent quality, listeners have no insight into the show itself.
